violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open packages of food in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed bare wooden shelves in pantry . All wood needs to be painted or sealed.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Observed that there is no vent hood over flat top in food prep area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic ceiling tiles in food prep area that is neither smooth, nor cleanable.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed torn linoleum in food prep area.
